Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCONTROLEFERIAS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &HojeData = serverdate() &HojeLimite90 = &HojeData.AddDays(90) loadWWPContext.Call(&wwpContext) prcGeraPrevisaoFerias.Call(&wwpContext.EmpCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cell_Grid_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid.InternalName) Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid_TitlesCategories.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESDTAADM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESDTAADM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESDTAADM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ActionGroup1Data = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Pagamento Férias/Rescisão' &ActionGroup1DataItem.Link = wwPagamentoRescisao.Link() &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Monitora Diárias' &ActionGroup1DataItem.Link = wwPagamentoDiarias.Link() &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Monitora Folhas' &ActionGroup1DataItem.Link = wwPagamentoFolhas.Link() &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &IncluirDemitidos = 'N' &PesRecSts = nullvalue(&PesRecSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Ferias' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount PesRecDtaAdm.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &StatusFerias.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' FerDtaFin.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' FerDtaLim.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &TercoPago.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &Ferias.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DetailWebComponent = !'' Do Case Case FerDtaLim > &HojeData and FerDiaPen > 0 &StatusFerias = 'P' CAse FerDtaLim <= &HojeData and FerDiaPen > 0 &StatusFerias = 'V' Otherwise &StatusFerias = 'R' EndCase if FerPgtoTer.IsEmpty() or FerPgtoTer.IsNull() or FerPgtoTer = 'P' &TercoPago = 'N' Else &TercoPago = 'S' Endif if FerPgto.IsEmpty() or FerPgto.IsNull() or FerPgto = 'P' &Ferias = 'N' Else &Ferias = 'S' Endif PesRecDtaAdm.ColumnClass = iif(not PesRecDtaDem.isEmpty() and not PesRecDtaDem.isnull(), !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') Do Case Case &StatusFerias.ToString().Trim() = !"P" &StatusFerias.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case &StatusFerias.ToString().Trim() = !"R" &StatusFerias.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case &StatusFerias.ToString().Trim() = !"V" &StatusFerias.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise &StatusFerias.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case FerDtaFin <= serverdate() FerDtaFin.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case FerDtaFin > serverdate() FerDtaFin.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise FerDtaFin.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case FerDtaLim <= &HojeData and FerDiaPen > 0 FerDtaLim.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case FerDtaLim <= &HojeLimite90 and FerDiaPen > 0 FerDtaLim.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise FerDtaLim.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case &TercoPago.ToString().Trim() = !"S" &TercoPago.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case &TercoPago.ToString().Trim() = !"N" &TercoPago.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise &TercoPago.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case &Ferias.ToString().Trim() = !"S" &Ferias.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case &Ferias.ToString().Trim() = !"N" &Ferias.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise &Ferias.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ PesRaz.Link = VerCliente.Link('wwControleFerias', EmpCod, PesCod) EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserInserir' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpPagamentoFerias.Call(0, 0, 'C') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_DWC.Object = wcRegistrosFerias.Create(EmpCod, PesCod, PesRecCod, FerAnoBas) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesDtaAdm1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESDTAADM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesDtaAdm1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesDtaAdm2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESDTAADM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesDtaAdm2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesDtaAdm3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESDTAADM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesDtaAdm3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESDTAADM' &PesDtaAdm2.SetEmpty() &PesDtaAdm_To2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESDTAADM' &PesDtaAdm3.SetEmpty() &PesDtaAdm_To3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FERANOBAS" &FerAnoBas.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESRAZ" &PesRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FERDIAPEN" &FerDiaPen.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"INCLUIRDEMITIDOS" &IncluirDemitidos.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESRECSTS" &PesRecSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESDTAADM' &PesDtaAdm1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesDtaAdm_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FERANOBAS", "", not &FerAnoBas.IsEmpty(), 0, &FerAnoBas.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESCOD", "", not &PesCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESRAZ", "", not &PesRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FERDIAPEN", "", not &FerDiaPen.IsEmpty(), 0, &FerDiaPen.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"INCLUIRDEMITIDOS", "", true, 0, &IncluirDemitidos, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESRECSTS", "", not &PesRecSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesRecSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESDTAADM' AND not (&PesDtaAdm1.IsEmpty() AND &PesDtaAdm_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesDtaAdm1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesDtaAdm_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESDTAADM' AND not (&PesDtaAdm2.IsEmpty() AND &PesDtaAdm_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesDtaAdm2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesDtaAdm_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESDTAADM' AND not (&PesDtaAdm3.IsEmpty() AND &PesDtaAdm_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesDtaAdm3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesDtaAdm_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Ferias" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event 'DoGerarRegistros' prcGeraPrevisaoFerias.Call(&wwpContext.EmpCod) EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
